title: Squirrel Removal in Tottenville, Staten Island | $900-$2,500 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional squirrel removal services in Tottenville, Staten Island. Humane trapping, exclusion & damage repair. Licensed experts serving 10307. Call today for fast service!
intro: Tottenville's tree-lined streets and historic homes provide ideal nesting spots for squirrels seeking entry into attics, chimneys, and crawl spaces. Best Pest Control NYC offers comprehensive squirrel removal services throughout this southernmost Staten Island neighborhood, protecting your property from damage and health risks. Our experienced technicians provide humane removal, permanent exclusion, and complete cleanup for Tottenville residents.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has served Tottenville homeowners for years with guaranteed squirrel removal solutions tailored to the area's unique Victorian-era homes and waterfront properties. Our licensed specialists use humane trapping methods, seal all entry points, and provide wildlife-proof repairs to ensure squirrels don't return to your Tottenville residence.
localContext: Tottenville's proximity to Conference House Park and abundant mature trees throughout the neighborhood create perfect habitats for gray squirrels seeking warm shelter in area homes. The historic architecture and older construction found near Main Street and along the waterfront often have vulnerable entry points that squirrels exploit to access attics and eaves.

faqs.question: How much does squirrel removal cost in Tottenville?
faqs.answer: Squirrel removal in Tottenville typically costs between $900 and $2,500 depending on the severity of the infestation, number of entry points, and extent of damage. This includes humane trapping, complete exclusion work, sanitization, and repairs to prevent re-entry.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove squirrels from my Tottenville home?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day or next-day service to Tottenville residents. The initial trapping process typically takes 3-7 days depending on how many squirrels are present. Once all squirrels are removed, we immediately seal entry points and complete exclusion work to prevent future intrusions.

faqs.question: What damage can squirrels cause to Tottenville homes?
faqs.answer: Squirrels can cause significant damage by chewing through electrical wiring (creating fire hazards), damaging insulation, gnawing on wooden beams and siding, and contaminating attic spaces with urine and droppings. In Tottenville's older homes, they often exploit existing vulnerabilities in rooflines and chimneys.

faqs.question: Do you offer guarantees for squirrel removal in Tottenville?
faqs.answer: Yes, we provide a comprehensive warranty on all exclusion work. If squirrels re-enter through any area we've sealed, we'll return to resolve the issue at no additional charge. Our thorough inspection and repair process ensures your Tottenville home remains squirrel-free long-term.
